title: phyllostegia glabra var. macraei
intro: Phyllostegia glabra var. macraei, also known as Hawaiian lantana or shrubby phyllostegia, is a shrub-like plant native to Hawaii and other Pacific islands. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllostegia glabra var. macraei include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
